idea-plugin.name: Roo Code for JetBrains (CE)
idea-plugin.description:
Roo Code for JetBrains (CE) - Run VSCode-based Coding Agents in JetBrains IDEs

Roo Code for JetBrains (CE) is an innovative cross-platform development tool that enables developers to run Roo Code agents and extensions within JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, etc.) or other IDE platforms.

Core Features

  • VSCode Agent Compatibility: Seamlessly run VSCode-based coding agents in JetBrains IDEs
  • Cross-IDE Development: Unified agent experience across different IDE platforms
  • AI-Powered Assistance: Leverage advanced AI coding assistants for intelligent code generation

Supported IDEs

Roo Code currently supports the following JetBrains IDE series:

  • IntelliJ IDEA (Ultimate & Community)
  • WebStorm - JavaScript and TypeScript development
  • PyCharm (Professional & Community) - Python development
  • PhpStorm - PHP development
  • RubyMine - Ruby development
  • CLion - C/C++ development
  • GoLand - Go development
  • DataGrip - Database development
  • Rider - .NET development
  • Android Studio - Android development

Requirements

  • Requires Node.js v18+ installed
  • Requires JetBrains IDE version 2023.1 or later for optimal compatibility

Benefits

  • Increased Productivity: Access powerful AI coding assistants without leaving your preferred IDE
  • Unified Workflow: Maintain a consistent development experience across different platforms
  • Extensible Architecture: Support for new agents and extensions as they become available
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 3.51.1.1

  • Feat: rename internal components from Wecoder to RooCode to avoid conflicts with other coders

Version 3.51.1.0

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.51.1

Version v3.50.5

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.50.5

Version v3.45.0

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.45.0

Version 3.41.3

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.41.3

Version 3.39.3

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.39.3

Version 3.36.16

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.16

Version 3.36.14

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.14

Version 3.36.11

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.11

Version 3.36.5

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.5

Version 3.36.2

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.2

Version 3.35.4

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.34.6
  • Fix: fix jcef timing issue at initialization

Version 3.34.6

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.34.6
  • Fix: fix jcef timing issue at initialization

Version 3.34.1

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.34.1
  • Fix: support PyCharm and stabilize WebView UI

Version 3.33.3

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.33.3
  • Fix: resolve editor concurrency issues

Version 3.33.1

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.33.1
  • Fix: resolve multi-window UI freeze

Version 3.33.0

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.33.0
  • Feat: Add checkpoint feature support
  • Fix: theme manager initialization

Version 3.32.1

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.32.1
  • Feat: support problem selector

Version 3.28.16

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.28.16
  • >Feat: support keymap and i18n

Version 3.28.15

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.28.15
  • >Fix: support dumb mode completely

Version 32.28.7

  • Upgrade roo-code to v32.28.7
  • Update toolwindow actions and icons

Version 32.28.2

  • Upgrade roo-code vsix to v32.28.7
  • Fix: fix ClassCastException issue when plugin reactivated
  • Fix: fix unacknowledgedCount issue
  • Fix: normalize file path separators for cross-platform compatibility
  • Fix: change logging level for debugging info

Version 32.25.17

  • Upgrade roo-code vsix to v32.25.17
  • Update build.sh and release RooCode zip instead of RunVSAgent

Version 32.25.11

  • Upgrade roo-code vsix to v32.25.11
  • Refactor project with roo-code branding

Version 0.1.7

  • Updated Roo Code version to 3.25.15 with latest AI coding assistant features
  • Added support for no proxy configuration in restricted network environments
  • Added support for @terminal for improved user experience

Version 0.1.6

  • Added proxy support for extension host to enable usage in restricted network environments
  • Fixed ConcurrentModificationException in EditorAndDocManager for improved stability
  • Updated Roo Code version to 3.25.10 with latest AI coding assistant features
  • Fixed an intermittent issue where an extra "}" character would appear at the end of the file.

Version 0.1.5

  • Added system information display while webview is loading
  • Fixed issue where LocalResHandler attempted to load non-local resources
  • Enhanced logging for webview initialization process
  • Updated documentation and added known issues list
  • Improved README with star history and updated contributor information

action.description: Roo Cloud settings and task synchronization
